name: monster-forge
description: D&D 2024 homebrew monster & encounter builder — no-build static site.

scripts.check: for f in data.js parsers.js core.js forge.js engine.js bestiary.js adventures.js roster.js combat.js dice3d.js seed.js app.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.lint: eslint data.js parsers.js core.js forge.js engine.js bestiary.js adventures.js roster.js combat.js dice3d.js seed.js app.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm test
